title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Forever 21 India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Forever 21 India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Forever 21 India! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Forever 21 India:
Forever 21 India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Forever 21 India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
